final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original sports action illustration of a basketball player dunking on a court (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "热血动漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 少年漫画 action illustration tradition (SLAM DUNK / 灌篮高手 era), 2000s Shonen Jump dynamic linework culture, modern sports anime key visual style (黒子のバスケ / ハイキュー!!); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a dramatic upward-angle framing of the dunking player mid-air, with motion blur applied to convey speed and tension
Subject: must include a basketball player leaping for a slam dunk, sweat droplets flying mid-air
Scene/backdrop: must include a basketball court, a cheering crowd in the background, and camera flashlights bursting from the stands
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tension, passionate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, high-contrast direction to amplify intensity — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs dynamic motion-blur and speed-line texture treatment — exact grain and stroke weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: static or flat composition; calm or low-energy mood
